description: Testing image upload functionality in different forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank with correct place holder
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of upload image item when:
+ User set image field is Blank
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank with correct place holder
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of upload image item when:
+ User set image field is not Blank (default image or selected image)
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value:  correct image as Data's value

description: Testing image upload from various sources and locations

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when location of image is:
+ Long path (max lenght)
+ Upload from PC
+ Drag&Drop between folders on PC
+ Upload from shared folder
+ Upload from External device (USB, Memory card...)
+ Upload from storage link (Facebook, Instagram..)
expected_result:
Always display correctly:
+ Image name
+ Image thumnail
+ Image size
+ Image effect
and upload successfully.

item_type: Image name (can't change name after upload image)
description: Testing image name handling during selection and after upload

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check name of image after Selected image when it has:
+ Max lenght
+ Special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#", "&", "$"...
+ Number & Alphabet characters (Upper/Lower case)
+ Japanese characters  (Half/Full-width)
+ Unicode characters
+ Spaces
+ SQL injection
+ HTML code
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as original image name with correct format
+ Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check name of image after Uploaded image when it has:
+ Max lenght
+ Special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#", "&", "$"...
+ Number & Alphabet characters (Upper/Lower case)
+ Japanese characters  (Half/Full-width)
+ Unicode characters
+ Spaces
+ SQL injection
+ HTML code
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as original image name with correct format
+ Can upload successfully

item_type: Image name (can change name after upload image)
description: Testing image name editing functionality after upload

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when change image name to new name which valid:
+ Max lenght -1 / Max lenght (64 characters)
+ Special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#", "&", "$"...
+ Number & Alphabet characters (Upper/Lower case)
+ Japanese characters  (Half/Full-width)
+ Unicode characters
+ Spaces
+ SQL injection
+ HTML code
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as edited image name with correct format
+ Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when change image name to new name which invalid:
+ Max lenght +1
+ Invalid symbol
expected_result:
+ Display error message
+ Can not upload with invalid file name

description: Testing image upload with different file sizes

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has capacity:
+ Max value
+ Min value
+ From Min to max value
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as edited image name with correct format
+ Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has capacity:
+ Max value + 1
+ Min value -1
expected_result:
+ Display error message
+ Can not upload with invalid file capacity

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has Height:
+ Max value
+ Min value
+ From Min to max value
expected_result: Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has Height:
+ Max value + 1
+ Min value -1
expected_result:
+ Display error message
+ Can not upload with invalid file capacity

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has width:
+ Max value
+ Min value
+ From Min to max value
expected_result: Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has width:
+ Max value + 1
+ Min value -1
expected_result:
+ Display error message
+ Can not upload with invalid file capacity

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has:
+ Min width, Max Height
expected_result:
+ Can upload successfully
+ Scale image without error (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has:
+ Max width, Min Height
expected_result:
+ Can upload successfully
+ Scale image without error (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has:
+ Min width, Min Height
expected_result:
+ Can upload successfully
+ Scale image without error (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when upload an image which has:
+ Max width, Max Height
expected_result:
+ Can upload successfully
+ Scale image without error (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when Edit image before Upload (Crop/Resize...) (base on spec)
expected_result: + Can upload edited email successfully (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when upload an image which has type is:
+ .jpg
+ .jpeg
+ .png
+ .tiff
+.giff
+ .bmp
+ .ICO
+ .ASF
+ .SVG
(Check with each supported types)
expected_result: Can upload successfully with supported file types

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when upload an image which has type is:
+ .MP3
+ .MP4, 
+ .MOV,
+ M4V,
+ .MPEG, 
... and other values: valid
expected_result: Display correct error message with correct format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when upload an image which has type is:
+ .csv,
+ .xls,
+ .txt,
+ .xlsx,
+ .tsv
... and Other values: valid
expected_result: Display correct error message with correct format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Change type from abnormal to normal 
ex: change from .csv to .jpg and  Upload image is changed type
expected_result: Display correct error message with correct format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Change type from normal to abnormal 
ex: change from .jpg to .csv and  Upload image is changed type
expected_result: Display correct error message with correct format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select image A, and then change to select image B and upload
expected_result: Can upload successfully with the last selected file.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Upload in cases:
+ Same name and same image 
+ Same name but not same image
+ Same image not same name
expected_result: Can upload successfully or display warning message (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check upload an image multi times
expected_result: Can upload successfully with the last selected file.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when:
+ Hover on uploaded file.
expected_result: Nothing happen (as spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when:
+ Click/Multi click on uploaded file.
expected_result: Image folder is displayed (as spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of uploaded image list
expected_result: Display correctly as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when:
+ Hover on uploaded file
expected_result: Image is zoom in and has no error <Base on your spec>

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display and operation of Delete icon of each image.
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as designed
+ Can delete selected file

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when:
+ Click/Multi click on uploaded file.
expected_result: Image is zoom in and has no error <Base on your spec>
